summary: Tested Soul-First Response Generation for MIRA OS. All 28 tests pass (18 unit tests + 10 integration tests). Soul-First logic correctly prioritizes Pet Soul data over breed assumptions. Verified Profile-First Doctrine is enforced.

coverage: TestBuildSoulContextSummary - 4 tests: empty pet, basic pet data, anxiety triggers, brachycephalic detection
TestDetermineResponseStrategy - 3 tests: soul_first, breed_fallback, ask_questions strategies
TestExtractSoulDataFromResponse - 7 tests: coat_type, grooming_preference, anxiety_triggers, but clause, grooming_history, skin/allergies, city extraction
TestGetFallbackQuestions - 3 tests: full/lite questions, pet name inclusion
test_get_pet_profile_for_mystique - Verified Soul data exists (coat_type=matted, grooming_preference=home, grooming_anxiety_triggers=[dryers])
test_mira_grooming_query_uses_soul_data - Mira uses Soul fields instead of breed assumptions
test_soul_data_extraction_from_user_response - Data extraction from user responses works
test_soul_first_prompt_injection_for_grooming - Soul-First prompt is injected for grooming queries

features_verified: Soul-First logic IS triggered for grooming/care queries
Response DOES use Soul fields instead of breed assumptions
Fallback questions ARE asked when Soul is sparse
Data extraction from user responses WORKS (coat_type, grooming_preference, anxiety_triggers)
Data write-back to pet profile WORKS
Profile-First Doctrine IS enforced (no breed-specific claims without Soul confirmation)

profile_first_verification.observation: Mystique (Shih Tzu) has 'Brachycephalic (heat sensitive)' in doggy_soul_answers.health_conditions
profile_first_verification.result: When Mira mentions heat sensitivity, it's using Soul data - NOT making breed assumptions

context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul-First Response Generation is fully functional. The test pet Mystique (pet-3661ae55d2e2) has Soul data including coat_type=matted, grooming_preference=home, grooming_anxiety_triggers=[dryers], and health_conditions='Brachycephalic (heat sensitive)'. The integration tests verify all Soul-First features are working correctly. Unit tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_soul_first_logic.py (18 tests) and integration tests in /app/backend/tests/test_soul_first_integration.py (10 tests).
